console_check: Chrome headless stderr contained Vite connection and React DevTools info lines only; no application console error, uncaught exception, or failed resource line was present.
copy_review: Resident-facing copy identifies official agenda, packet, and approved-minutes sections; missing records route residents to the clerk; restricted-session existence, counts, and summaries are not disclosed.
accessibility_review: Headings, labelled search form, button text, focusable controls, loading/empty/error/partial state cards, and mobile single-column layout were inspected in the rendered browser output.
